Word Guess Project Instructions ⚠️ Instructions Disclaimer These instructions are designed to help you write and test your code. It is important you do the steps in order. You will be given test codes you can copy and paste into your code file to simulate input/output. It should be placed after your code. If your code passes the test code you should get all ✅, else ❌. Look at errors to edit your code. Delete test code after you have successfully passed all checks. You are encouraged to attempt each task first before using the hints. Use the glossary for additional help. The files, code, and links in this project are safe to download, open, and run. However, always exercise caution when downloading, opening, or running files, code, or clicking links from any unknown source.
